data.homepage_text: PERPTools â The Market Never Sleeps Platform How It Works Arena Security MCP Doc Launch App The Market Never Sleeps. Trade smarter with autonomous agents, real on-chain transparency, and CEX-grade performance â without giving up control. Launch App AI Arena Perps, refined. Speed of a CEX. Custody of a DEX. CEX-level performance Low-latency, high-throughput matching. Built for HFT and pro strategies. Full order suite Limit, Market, TP/SL, Post-only, IOC, FOK, Reduce-only. Everything you'd expect. Nothing you'd miss. Omnichain liquidity One orderbook. Multiple chains. Tight spreads, minimal slippage. Hands-on or hands-off Trade from your wallet. Or delegate to an agent vault. Always your call. Agents execute your rules. No magic. Your rules, defined once â running without you. The same cycle, every trade, every hour, every day. // 01 Signal Detection The agent reads every market â price, depth, funding, on-chain flow â across every timeframe, simultaneously. You'd need 12 screens. It needs none. // 02 Risk Assessment Before any entry, it calculates the worst case â position size, margin, expected drawdown â against your limits. If the math doesn't work, the trade doesn't happen. // 03 Order Execution By the time a human hits Confirm, the position is already open. Orders on-chain in under 8ms â before the price moves against you. // 04 Position Management Always in control. Never idle. The agent monitors, adjusts risk, scales positions, and exits with precision â 24/7, without hesitation. Agents don't sleep. The numbers prove it. Strategies run 24/7, markets don't wait. Here's what PERPTools agents have been doing. $0 M+ // Total Volume $0 K+ // Profits Realized 0 % // Win Rate 0 MS // Median Latency The leaderboard doesn't lie. Execution runs on Orderly Network â the omnichain, non-custodial infrastructure powering $188B+ in cumulative perpetuals volume. Your keys, your coins, your trades. Your keys. Your coins. On-chain. PERPTools never holds your funds. Assets settle through Orderly's on-chain vault â you keep custody, you sign each grant, and you revoke access in one transaction . No intermediary stands between you and your position. Self-custodial One orderbook. Every chain. Live across every major chain through Orderly's shared liquidity â every fill, fee, and position clears through one unified book on-chain. Fake performance is mathematically impossible. $188B+ Cumulative Volume Audited. Battle-tested. Public. Orderly's contracts have passed multiple independent audits and already power trading for 1M+ users across the ecosystem. Every report is open. The protocol is the only counterparty. customer_types.name: Professional Algorithmic Traders
customer_types.description: Advanced traders seeking sophisticated automated execution strategies with minimal manual intervention and maximum performance optimization.

personas.name: High-Frequency Strategy Architect
personas.description: Technical professional designing complex multi-market trading strategies with precision and speed requirements
questions: How can I automate my entry and exit rules without writing complex code?
What latency benchmarks does your platform guarantee for large-scale order execution?
Can I create risk management parameters that dynamically adjust based on market volatility?
How does the platform handle simultaneous order execution across multiple market venues?
What performance metrics can I use to validate my strategy's effectiveness?

personas.name: Risk Management Specialist
personas.description: Disciplined trader focused on precise risk control and systematic position sizing
questions: How granular can my position sizing rules become when setting automated limits?
What fail-safe mechanisms prevent unexpected large losses during market turbulence?
Can I set maximum drawdown thresholds that trigger automatic position closure?
How transparent are the risk assessment calculations before trade execution?
What reporting tools help me analyze my strategy's risk-adjusted performance?

customer_types.name: Passive Income Seekers
customer_types.description: Individuals looking to generate supplemental returns through automated trading systems with minimal active management.

personas.name: Side Hustle Enthusiast
personas.description: Technology-savvy individual seeking passive income streams through intelligent automated systems
questions: How much technical knowledge do I need to set up an automated trading strategy? [NEEDS_REWRITE]
Can I allocate different risk levels to multiple independent trading agents? [NEEDS_REWRITE]
What kind of returns can I realistically expect from a hands-off approach?
How much time per week would I need to monitor and adjust my trading agents? [NEEDS_REWRITE]
Are there pre-configured strategy templates for beginners?

personas.name: Time-Constrained Professional
personas.description: Busy professional seeking smart investment tools that operate independently of personal schedule
questions: How reliable are the autonomous trading agents during different market conditions? [NEEDS_REWRITE]
Can I set specific time-based constraints for my trading strategy? [NEEDS_REWRITE]
What safeguards prevent unexpected large-scale transactions?
How quickly can I intervene or pause my automated trading agents? [NEEDS_REWRITE]
What level of detailed performance reporting is available?
